input_text: Hadam la Malaysia kalah lagi, buat malu je setiap kali main. Baik bubar terus pasukan bola tu.
reason: Over-dramatic disappointment about national football team with a call to disband. Emotionally charged dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: Kecewa dengan kekalahan Malaysia, harap pasukan boleh perbaiki prestasi di masa depan.

input_text: Kalau tak makan nasi lemak tepi jalan, kau bukan Malaysian sebenar la bro.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on food preferences. Excludes those who don't fit a narrow cultural mold.
suggested_rewrite: Nasi lemak tepi jalan memang salah satu pengalaman best sebagai rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Tengok la orang tu post gambar kereta baru, nak show off je kerja dia. Sombong gila.
reason: Rude dismissal of someone sharing their new car on social media, accusing them of being arrogant without basis.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai orang suka kongsi pencapaian baru di media sosial, mungkin dia memang gembira.

input_text: Budak zaman sekarang tak boleh terima kritik langsung, sikit-sikit nak cancel orang.
reason: Stereotyping younger generation as overly sensitive. Dismissive generalization about an entire age group.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap generasi ada cara tersendiri menangani kritik, mungkin kita boleh faham perspektif mereka.

input_text: Menteri cakap nak selesai banjir, lepas tu banjir lagi. Memang lawak je kerajaan ni.
reason: Snarky dismissal of government flood mitigation efforts. Emotionally charged but lacks constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah banjir masih berulang walaupun ada janji kerajaan, harap ada penambahbaikan sebenar.

input_text: Aku forward ni, kawan aku cakap air paip KL ada bahan kimia bahaya. Hati-hati semua!
reason: Forwarding an unverified claim about water safety that could cause unnecessary panic without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Ada dakwaan tentang kualiti air paip KL, tapi belum disahkan. Boleh semak dengan pihak berkuasa untuk kepastian.

input_text: Orang yang order Grab Food untuk jarak 500 meter tu memang malas tahap dewa.
reason: Mocking people who use food delivery for short distances. Dismissive judgment of personal choices.
suggested_rewrite: Masing-masing ada sebab guna Grab Food, mungkin sibuk atau tak sihat.

input_text: Confirm la viral sebab orang Malaysia memang suka drama. Takde benda lain nak buat.
reason: Stereotyping all Malaysians as drama-seeking with nothing productive to do. Dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Benda ni viral mungkin sebab ramai yang berminat dengan isu ini.

input_text: Orang yang puji makanan Singapore lagi sedap memang pengkhianat la, tak payah balik Malaysia.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian loyalty based on food opinions. Labeling someone a traitor for a food preference is extreme.
suggested_rewrite: Kita boleh setuju tak setuju soal makanan, tapi tiada siapa perlu dilabel pengkhianat kerana citarasa.

input_text: Pasukan badminton dah tak macam dulu, semua pemain baru ni lembik. Baik pencen awal.
reason: Harsh dismissal of new badminton players as weak, calling for them to retire. Exaggerated disappointment.
suggested_rewrite: Pemain baru masih dalam proses pembangunan, harap mereka dapat bimbingan untuk mencapai tahap lebih tinggi.

input_text: Siapa share berita dari portal tu memang bodoh, semua fake news je kerja diorang.
reason: Calling people stupid for sharing news from a specific portal. Rude dismissal combined with unverified claim about fake news.
suggested_rewrite: Elok kita semak kesahihan berita sebelum share, ada portal yang kurang dipercayai.

input_text: Semua orang nak jadi influencer sekarang, content sampah pun main post je. Memalukan.
reason: Dismissive and insulting toward aspiring content creators. Calling their work trash is unnecessarily harsh.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai yang mencuba bidang content creation, walaupun kualiti berbeza, semua orang bermula dari bawah.

input_text: Nak buat apa pun salah, Malaysia memang negara tak boleh maju sebab rakyat sendiri yang rosak.
reason: Blaming the entire Malaysian population for national problems. Overly negative generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Ada cabaran yang perlu diatasi bersama, tapi rakyat Malaysia juga banyak yang berusaha ke arah kemajuan.

input_text: Tak payah la explain, memang kau jenis yang tak faham konteks. Typical.
reason: Rude dismissal of someone's ability to understand in an online debate. Condescending and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Mungkin kita ada perspektif berbeza, boleh saya jelaskan lebih lanjut.

input_text: Singapore punya public transport baru boleh panggil world class, kita punya tu sampah je.
reason: Over-dramatic unfavorable comparison of Malaysian transport to Singapore, calling it trash.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pengangkutan awam Malaysia masih boleh diperbaiki jika dibandingkan dengan negara jiran.

input_text: Harimau Malaya main macam kucing, memalukan depan penyokong sendiri.
reason: Insulting the national football team by comparing them to cats. Exaggerated disappointment over performance.
suggested_rewrite: Harimau Malaya tak bermain seperti yang diharapkan, semoga pasukan boleh bangkit dalam perlawanan seterusnya.

input_text: Kau tak pernah rasa durian Musang King, jangan cakap kau orang Malaysia.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on whether someone has eaten a specific durian variety.
suggested_rewrite: Durian Musang King memang popular di Malaysia, kalau belum cuba, boleh try!

input_text: Orang complaint pasal harga barang naik tapi hari-hari beli Starbucks. Hipokrit betul.
reason: Mocking people's spending habits while dismissing their valid concerns about rising prices.
suggested_rewrite: Harga barang memang naik, dan semua orang ada pilihan masing-masing dalam berbelanja.

input_text: Yelah yelah, kau memang pandai sangat kan. Semua orang salah, kau je betul.
reason: Sarcastic and dismissive response in a debate, shutting down the other person's argument rudely.
suggested_rewrite: Saya faham pandangan kau, tapi saya ada perspektif berbeza yang boleh kita bincangkan.

input_text: Thailand pun lagi maju dari kita sekarang. Malu weh jadi Malaysian.
reason: Over-dramatic comparison with Thailand, expressing shame about being Malaysian. Unnecessarily negative.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap negara ada kelebihan masing-masing, Malaysia pun banyak pencapaian yang boleh dibanggakan.

input_text: URGENT!! Jangan beli ayam dari supplier X, kawan aku cakap ada suntikan hormon bahaya!
reason: Forwarding unverified food safety scare about chicken from a named supplier. Could harm business reputation.
suggested_rewrite: Ada dakwaan tentang kualiti ayam dari sesetengah supplier, tapi belum disahkan. Boleh semak dengan KPDNHEP.

input_text: Kedai mamak tutup awal? Ini bukan Malaysia yang aku kenal. Negara dah jatuh.
reason: Over-dramatic reaction to a mamak shop closing early, declaring the nation has fallen. Clickbait-level exaggeration.
suggested_rewrite: Terkejut kedai mamak tutup awal, mungkin ada sebab tertentu.

input_text: Malaysia punya airport baru pun bocor, buat apa banding dengan Changi. Malu je.
reason: Mocking national infrastructure by comparing negatively with Singapore's Changi airport. Over-dramatic shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kebocoran di terminal baru perlu ditangani segera, kita harap kualiti penyelenggaraan ditingkatkan.

input_text: Orang yang sokong team lain masa Malaysia main tu memang tak ada patriotik langsung.
reason: Questioning the patriotism of Malaysians who support other sports teams. Exclusionary gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun kita sokong pasukan lain juga, semangat menyokong Malaysia tetap penting.

input_text: Buat apa vote pun, semua politician sama je. Janji manis lepas tu lupakan rakyat.
reason: Cynical blanket dismissal of all politicians and the voting process. Undermines democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Memang ada kekecewaan dengan sesetengah ahli politik, tapi mengundi tetap penting untuk membuat perubahan.

input_text: Post vacation photos lagi, asyik nak flex je. Kita yang kerja keras ni macam bodoh pulak.
reason: Resentful and rude reaction to others posting vacation photos, expressing bitterness and calling hardworking people stupid.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai yang suka kongsi gambar percutian, kita pun boleh merancang untuk bercuti bila ada peluang.

input_text: Korang yang beli iPhone baru tiap tahun tu memang bodo, bazir duit je.
reason: Calling annual iPhone buyers stupid. Rude judgment of others' spending choices.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada keutamaan berbeza dalam berbelanja, mungkin teknologi penting untuk mereka.

input_text: Lepas ni semua nak cakap pasal mental health la, padahal dulu semua okay je. Trend je ni.
reason: Dismissing mental health awareness as just a trend. Invalidates people's genuine struggles.
suggested_rewrite: Kesedaran tentang kesihatan mental semakin meningkat, dan ini sebenarnya perkembangan positif.

input_text: Orang yang masih pakai TnG card instead of e-wallet tu hidup zaman batu ke?
reason: Mocking people who use physical TnG cards as living in the Stone Age. Dismissive of personal choice.
suggested_rewrite: E-wallet memang mudah, tapi ada yang masih selesa guna kad TnG fizikal, masing-masing ada pilihan.

input_text: Apa yang kau tahu pasal politik? Baru keluar uni dah nak bagi pendapat. Duduk diam.
reason: Dismissing a young person's political opinions based on age. Condescending and silencing.
suggested_rewrite: Semua orang berhak berpendapat tentang politik, tak kira umur atau pengalaman.

input_text: Setiap kali banjir, mesti ada yang post gambar selfie. Attention seeker memang tak habis.
reason: Labeling flood selfie posters as attention seekers. Dismissive of people who may be documenting real situations.
suggested_rewrite: Ada yang kongsi gambar banjir untuk tunjuk keadaan sebenar, walaupun ada juga yang kurang sensitif.

input_text: Tak payah argue dengan orang macam ni, otak letak lutut.
reason: Insulting someone's intelligence in a debate by saying their brain is in their knee.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau pendapat berbeza, lebih baik kita bincang secara matang daripada menghina.

input_text: Jangan percaya cerita dia, memang jenis suka dramatik. Semua benda nak lebih-lebihkan.
reason: Dismissing someone's account entirely by labeling them dramatic. Character attack in a discussion.
suggested_rewrite: Mungkin ada perspektif berbeza, tapi kita dengar dulu cerita penuh sebelum buat kesimpulan.

input_text: Hari ni panas gila, global warming dah sampai Malaysia. Kita semua nak mati la macam ni.
reason: Over-dramatic claim about dying from heat, attributing a hot day directly to global warming arriving in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Cuaca panas melampau memang membimbangkan, mungkin berkaitan perubahan iklim yang perlu ditangani bersama.

input_text: Kalau kau tak pernah kena stuck jam kat KL, kau bukan orang KL sebenar.
reason: Gatekeeping KL resident identity based on traffic jam experience. Humorous but still exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Jam di KL memang satu pengalaman biasa, tapi bukan satu-satunya ciri orang KL.

input_text: Malaysian drivers are literally the worst in the world. No brain cells involved when they drive.
reason: Sweeping negative generalization about all Malaysian drivers with an insulting remark about intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety in Malaysia could use improvement. Many drivers could benefit from better awareness.

input_text: Every time also like this, Malaysia boleh is just a joke at this point.
reason: Cynically dismissing the national motto as meaningless. Over-dramatic negativity about national identity.
suggested_rewrite: It's frustrating when things don't go well, but Malaysia has made real progress in many areas.

input_text: If you don't speak Bahasa, can you even call yourself Malaysian? Just saying.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on language ability. Dismissive of multilingual or non-Malay-speaking Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Language is one part of our identity, but being Malaysian is about more than just speaking one language.

input_text: Wah another day another pothole in KL. Third world infrastructure with first world prices. Classic Malaysia.
reason: Over-dramatic comparison of Malaysia to third-world countries over potholes. Sensational and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Road maintenance in KL needs attention. The potholes are a recurring issue that authorities should address.

input_text: Real Malaysians tapau everything. If you eat in, you're basically a tourist la.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on dining habits. Humorous but still exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Tapau culture is a fun part of being Malaysian, though everyone has their own dining preferences.

input_text: My friend told me that eating kangkung from certain areas can cause cancer. Please share to save lives!!
reason: Forwarding unverified health scare about a common vegetable. Could cause unnecessary panic.
suggested_rewrite: There are claims about kangkung safety in certain areas, but it's best to verify with health authorities before spreading alarm.

input_text: Honest ah, our education system produces robots, not thinkers. That's why we can never compete.
reason: Harsh and sweeping criticism of the entire education system. Dismissive of students and educators alike.
suggested_rewrite: Our education system has room for improvement in encouraging critical thinking alongside academic excellence.

input_text: Don't even argue with these people, they cannot think beyond their kampung mentality.
reason: Dismissing others as having backward 'kampung mentality' in a debate. Condescending and regionally prejudiced.
suggested_rewrite: People have different perspectives shaped by their experiences. It helps to engage with understanding.

input_text: Our PM goes overseas and makes us look like a joke every time. So embarrassing.
reason: Harsh and vague dismissal of the PM's international appearances without specific critique. Over-dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: I wish our PM's overseas appearances projected a stronger image. Specific diplomatic skills could be improved.

input_text: Y'all need to stop comparing Malaysia to Japan. We're not even in the same league, never will be.
reason: Defeatist comparison with Japan, asserting Malaysia can never reach the same level. Overly negative.
suggested_rewrite: Comparing countries isn't always fair, but we can learn from Japan's strengths while building on our own.

input_text: Seriously, how can anyone defend our healthcare wait times? You'll die before you see a doctor.
reason: Exaggerated claim about healthcare wait times. Sensational language dismisses the system entirely.
suggested_rewrite: Healthcare wait times in government hospitals can be long. Improvements in staffing and resources would help.

input_text: You only support local brands because you can't afford international ones. Don't pretend it's patriotism.
reason: Insulting people's motives for supporting local brands. Cynical and condescending.
suggested_rewrite: People support local brands for many reasons including patriotism, quality, and affordability.

input_text: These Malaysian aunties in WhatsApp groups forwarding fake health tips are a national hazard lah.
reason: Stereotyping older Malaysian women as spreading misinformation. Ageist and gendered dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: Misinformation spreads in WhatsApp groups. We can help by gently sharing verified sources with family members.

input_text: Malaysians who migrate overseas and then criticize Malaysia are the worst hypocrites.
reason: Labeling diaspora Malaysians as hypocrites for criticizing the country. Gatekeeping who can have opinions.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysians abroad may have valid observations. Constructive criticism from any perspective can be valuable.

input_text: Why are Malaysian companies so stingy with salaries? No wonder all the talent leaves.
reason: Sweeping negative generalization about all Malaysian companies. Valid concern expressed rudely.
suggested_rewrite: Competitive salaries are important for talent retention. Many Malaysian companies could improve compensation packages.

input_text: Whoever designed this MRT route must have been sleeping on the job. Absolute waste of money.
reason: Insulting infrastructure planners and dismissing the entire MRT project as a waste. Over-dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: The MRT route planning could be improved to better serve commuters. Public feedback on routing is important.

input_text: Honestly, Malaysian weddings are just a competition of who can waste the most money.
reason: Dismissive characterization of Malaysian wedding culture as wasteful competition. Disrespects cultural traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian weddings are rich in tradition. While costs can be high, many families see it as an important celebration.

input_text: Someone told me they saw rats at that famous hawker stall. Don't eat there anymore guys!!
reason: Spreading unverified claim about rats at a specific food stall. Could damage reputation without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: If there are hygiene concerns at any food stall, it's best to report directly to the health department for investigation.

input_text: Malaysian uncles on Facebook sharing fake news is the most dangerous thing in this country.
reason: Stereotyping older Malaysian men as the biggest source of misinformation. Ageist and gendered.
suggested_rewrite: Misinformation on social media is a concern across all age groups. Digital literacy education can help everyone.

input_text: Our athletes only do well when there's bonus money. No passion, just chasing ringgit.
reason: Accusing all Malaysian athletes of being motivated only by money. Dismisses their dedication.
suggested_rewrite: Incentives are part of sports, but many Malaysian athletes show genuine passion and sacrifice in their careers.

input_text: Tamil school students can't speak proper English or Malay. What's the point of these schools then?
reason: Questioning the value of Tamil schools based on language stereotypes. Dismissive of vernacular education.
suggested_rewrite: Language proficiency varies across all school types. Vernacular schools serve an important cultural role alongside academic goals.

input_text: You want to debate me on this? Lol sit down, you don't even understand basic economics.
reason: Condescendingly shutting down debate by insulting someone's knowledge. Rude dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: We may see this differently. I'd be happy to discuss the economic reasoning behind my perspective.

input_text: Malaysian drivers who don't use signal are proof that evolution can go backwards.
reason: Insulting drivers who don't signal as de-evolved. Humorous but crosses into rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Using turn signals is important for road safety. More awareness campaigns could help improve driving habits.

input_text: I cannot believe people are defending this policy. Zero critical thinking skills in this country.
reason: Insulting the critical thinking abilities of an entire nation because they support a policy.
suggested_rewrite: People may have different reasons for supporting this policy. It's worth understanding their perspective before judging.

input_text: Malaysia is like a phone with 1% battery. Still functioning but barely.
reason: Metaphor dismissing Malaysia as barely functioning. Snarky and over-dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia faces challenges, but there's still a lot of potential and positive developments happening.

input_text: 大马人就是这样啦，什么都要complain但是自己也不做什么改变。
reason: Stereotyping all Malaysians as complainers who take no action. Dismissive generalization of national character.
suggested_rewrite: 有些人喜欢抱怨但也有很多大马人在默默努力改变现状。

input_text: 这些人在社交媒体炫富真的很low，有钱不代表有素质。
reason: Dismissing people who share wealth on social media as low-class. Judgmental and rude.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人分享生活的方式不同，不一定代表炫耀，我们可以选择不关注。

input_text: 你们这些只会在网上骂人的keyboard warrior，现实中肯定很怂。
reason: Insulting online commenters as cowards in real life. Rude and dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 网上讨论有时会变得激烈，大家应该用更尊重的方式交流意见。

input_text: 那些还在用cash的人真的是活在石器时代，e-wallet都不会用。
reason: Mocking cash users as living in the Stone Age. Dismissive of people who may have valid reasons for not using e-wallets.
suggested_rewrite: 电子钱包越来越普及了，但有些人可能有自己的原因继续使用现金。

input_text: 大马的wifi速度真的可以去死，比越南还慢。
reason: Crude expression of frustration about internet speed, comparing unfavorably to Vietnam. Over-dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: 大马的网速有时令人不满意，希望电信公司能改善服务品质。

input_text: 华人不会讲华语的就不要说自己是华人了啦，丢脸。
reason: Gatekeeping Chinese identity based on language ability. Shaming those who don't speak Mandarin.
suggested_rewrite: 语言只是文化的一部分，不会讲华语并不代表不认同自己的华人身份。

input_text: 每次大马队输球我都觉得丢脸，根本不配代表国家。
reason: Harsh claim that national team is unworthy of representing the country. Exaggerated sports disappointment.
suggested_rewrite: 输球确实让人失望，希望球队能继续努力提升水平来回报球迷的支持。

input_text: 那些拿了PR还说自己爱马来西亚的人最假了。
reason: Questioning the patriotism of Malaysians who have obtained permanent residency elsewhere.
suggested_rewrite: 获得外国PR不代表不爱马来西亚，每个人的生活选择有不同的考量。

input_text: 看看人家韩国的entertainment industry，再看看我们的，简直没法比。丢脸。
reason: Unfavorable comparison of Malaysian entertainment industry with Korea's, expressing shame.
suggested_rewrite: 韩国娱乐产业确实发展成熟，大马也有自己独特的文化内容值得发展和推广。

input_text: 大马的gym culture就是拍照打卡，谁真的在锻炼？全部都是做样子。
reason: Dismissing all gym-goers in Malaysia as fake, only taking photos. Sweeping and rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 有些人喜欢在健身房拍照分享，但也有很多人在认真锻炼，不应该一概而论。

input_text: 大马华人不支持华教的真的没有根，忘了自己从哪里来。
reason: Gatekeeping Chinese Malaysian identity based on support for Chinese education. Exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: 华教是大马华人文化的重要部分，但每个人对教育的选择和支持方式可以不同。

input_text: 这些网红推荐的餐厅都是paid review，信了你就是傻瓜。
reason: Calling people who trust influencer restaurant reviews fools. Rude and makes an unverified blanket claim.
suggested_rewrite: 有些餐厅推荐可能是付费合作，建议大家参考多方评价再决定。

input_text: 大马的夜市就是吵、脏、乱。还好意思叫tourist attraction。
reason: Dismissing Malaysian night markets as noisy, dirty, and chaotic. Insulting a cultural attraction.
suggested_rewrite: 夜市的卫生和秩序确实可以改善，但夜市文化本身是大马独特的魅力之一。

input_text: 看这些人排队买limited edition东西，大马人就是这么没脑。
reason: Calling Malaysians brainless for queuing for limited edition items. Insulting generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 排队购买限量版商品是个人选择，每个人有不同的兴趣和消费习惯。

input_text: மலேசியா கிரிக்கெட் அணி இருக்கா? யாருக்கும் தெரியாது, அவ்வளவு மோசம்.
reason: Snarky dismissal of Malaysia's cricket team as irrelevant and terrible. Over-dramatic put-down of national athletes.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா கிரிக்கெட் அணி இன்னும் வளர்ச்சியடைந்து வருகிறது, அவர்களுக்கு ஆதரவு தேவை.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் தமிழர்களுக்கு எதுவும் கிடைக்காது, எல்லாம் drama தான்.
reason: Sweeping claim that Tamil community gets nothing in Malaysia. Emotionally charged communal grievance without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழ் சமூகத்தின் தேவைகளுக்கு கூடுதல் கவனம் தேவை என்று சிலர் உணர்கிறார்கள், இது குறித்து ஆக்கபூர்வமாக பேசலாம்.

input_text: இணையத்தில் படித்த ஒரு செய்தி - tap water-ல் heavy metal இருக்காம். எல்லாரும் filter போடுங்க!
reason: Sharing unverified health claim about heavy metals in tap water. Could cause unnecessary alarm.
suggested_rewrite: இணையத்தில் tap water பற்றிய செய்தி வந்துள்ளது, ஆனால் உறுதிப்படுத்தப்படவில்லை. சுகாதார நிபுணர்களை அணுகுவது நல்லது.

input_text: மலேசியா கால்பந்து அணி பார்க்கவே வெட்கமா இருக்கு, என்ன training பண்றாங்க?
reason: Expressing shame about the national football team and questioning their training. Harsh and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா கால்பந்து அணியின் செயல்திறன் மேம்பட வேண்டும், நல்ல பயிற்சி திட்டம் தேவை.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் நல்ல வேலை கிடைக்காது, Singapore போறது தான் best.
reason: Blanket dismissal of job opportunities in Malaysia, claiming Singapore is the only option.
suggested_rewrite: சிங்கப்பூரில் வேலை வாய்ப்புகள் அதிகம் என்றாலும், மலேசியாவிலும் பல துறைகளில் நல்ல வாய்ப்புகள் உள்ளன.

input_text: இங்கே யாரும் தமிழ் படம் பார்க்க மாட்டார்கள், எல்லாரும் Korean drama fan. Culture மறந்துட்டாங்க.
reason: Guilt-tripping Malaysian Tamils for watching Korean dramas instead of Tamil films. Cultural gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: பல இளைஞர்கள் Korean drama மற்றும் தமிழ் படங்கள் இரண்டையும் ரசிக்கிறார்கள், கலாசாரம் பன்முகத்தன்மை கொண்டது.

input_text: இந்த country-ல் Indian-கள் எப்போதும் last priority, அரசாங்கம் கண்டுகொள்ளாது.
reason: Sweeping claim that Indians are always last priority. Valid frustrations expressed as a blanket accusation.
suggested_rewrite: இந்திய சமூகத்தின் சில தேவைகள் கவனிக்கப்பட வேண்டும் என்று பலர் நம்புகிறார்கள், இதை ஆக்கபூர்வமாக முன்வைக்கலாம்.

input_text: பொது போக்குவரத்தை நம்பி office போறவங்க daily torture-ல தான் இருக்காங்க, வேற country-ல இப்படி இருக்காது.
reason: Over-dramatic claim that public transport commuters face daily torture unique to Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: பொது போக்குவரத்தில் சிரமங்கள் உள்ளன, இதை மேம்படுத்த அரசாங்கம் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: நம்ம ஊர் hospital queue-ல நின்னா ஒரு நாள் முழுக்க போகும், இதுக்கு doctor-ஐ பார்க்காம இருக்கலாம்.
reason: Over-dramatic claim about hospital queues suggesting it's better to skip seeing a doctor entirely.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவமனை காத்திருப்பு நேரம் நீண்டது, இதை குறைக்க அதிக வளங்கள் ஒதுக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டுல road எல்லாம் pothole, India-வை விட மோசம்.
reason: Over-dramatic claim that Malaysian roads are worse than India's, using unfavorable comparison.
suggested_rewrite: சாலை பராமரிப்பு மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும், pothole பிரச்சனையை அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: BREAKING: Kucing masuk 7-Eleven di Subang!! Malaysia is truly finished guys 😂
reason: Clickbait-style sensationalism over a mundane event, sarcastically implying national decline.
suggested_rewrite: Lucu je kucing masuk 7-Eleven di Subang, binatang pun nak shopping.

input_text: Kau tak reti cakap Manglish, kau bukan real Malaysian. Sorry not sorry.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on ability to speak Manglish. Exclusionary and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Manglish is a fun part of Malaysian culture, but not speaking it doesn't make anyone less Malaysian.

input_text: Dengar cerita kedai makan area tu guna minyak terpakai, be careful guys. Spread the word!
reason: Spreading unverified claims about restaurants using recycled cooking oil. Could harm businesses unfairly.
suggested_rewrite: Ada rumor pasal minyak masak di kawasan tu, tapi better report to authorities if you have evidence.

input_text: 大马的路灯晚上都不亮，跟住在kampung没什么分别。
reason: Dismissing urban infrastructure as village-like. Rude comparison that also stereotypes kampung living negatively.
suggested_rewrite: 路灯维修需要加强，希望有关部门能够关注这个问题。

input_text: Kalau kau tak boleh tahan pedas, jangan claim kau Malaysian. Full stop.
reason: Gatekeeping Malaysian identity based on spice tolerance. Exclusionary and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Spicy food is a big part of Malaysian cuisine, but not everyone has the same tolerance, and that's okay.

input_text: Kawan aku forward, katanya ada sindiket culik budak dekat area Shah Alam. Parents be careful!
reason: Forwarding unverified kidnapping scare in a specific area. Could cause panic without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Ada mesej tentang kes culik di Shah Alam, tapi belum confirmed. Better check with PDRM before sharing.

input_text: LOL Malaysia nak jadi hub teknologi tapi internet pun tak stabil. Mimpi je la.
reason: Sarcastically mocking Malaysia's tech aspirations due to internet issues. Dismissive of national ambitions.
suggested_rewrite: For Malaysia to become a tech hub, internet infrastructure stability is one of the key areas to improve.

input_text: இந்த அரசாங்கம் எப்போதும் வாக்குறுதி மட்டும்தான், ஒன்றும் செய்யாது. Waste of time.
reason: Blanket dismissal of the entire government as useless. Cynical without constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கம் சில வாக்குறுதிகளை நிறைவேற்றவில்லை என்பது உண்மை, ஆனால் மக்கள் தொடர்ந்து குரல் கொடுப்பது முக்கியம்.

input_text: Orang yang guna Android memang miskin, iPhone users are the real ones.
reason: Mocking Android users as poor while elevating iPhone users. Classist and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Both Android and iPhone have their strengths. Pilihan phone tak menentukan status seseorang.

input_text: 大马人最会的就是lepak，难怪经济永远追不上新加坡。
reason: Stereotyping Malaysians as lazy (lepak culture) and blaming it for economic performance vs Singapore.
suggested_rewrite: Lepak文化是大马的一部分，但大马经济发展有其独特的挑战和优势。

input_text: VIRAL: Pakcik jual goreng pisang kena saman!! Welcome to Malaysia where even breathing costs money.
reason: Clickbait-style sensationalism about a mundane enforcement action, with exaggerated commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Ada isu penjaja kena saman yang menjadi viral. Mungkin ada sebab tertentu dan boleh disemak lebih lanjut.

input_text: 那些说Malaysia food不好吃的人taste bud坏了吧，不会欣赏就别来。
reason: Insulting people who don't like Malaysian food, telling them not to come. Aggressive defensiveness.
suggested_rewrite: 大马食物很丰富多样，每个人口味不同，可以推荐他们尝试不同的美食。

input_text: Nak jadi Malaysian tapi tak tahu lagu Negaraku? What kind of citizen are you?
reason: Questioning citizenship based on not knowing the national anthem lyrics. Exclusionary gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Negaraku is our national anthem and it's great when all Malaysians know it. Boleh ajar mereka yang tak ingat.

input_text: 大马人就是太nice了，所以被政府和老板bully。活该。
reason: Stereotyping Malaysians as too nice and saying they deserve being exploited. Victim-blaming tone.
suggested_rewrite: 大马人的友善是优点，同时我们也应该学会维护自己的权益。

input_text: 大马的parking永远找不到位，设计停车场的人脑子是不是有问题？
reason: Insulting parking lot designers as mentally deficient over a common frustration. Rude and over-dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: 大马的停车位确实不太够，希望城市规划能多考虑停车需求。

input_text: Malaysian bosses expect you to work OT for free, lepas tu kata 'we are family'. Bullshit la.
reason: Crude dismissal of workplace culture using vulgar language. Valid frustration expressed with hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Some workplaces in Malaysia have unhealthy OT culture, penting untuk ada work-life balance yang sihat.
